title: lygodium volubile var. lucens
intro: Lygodium volubile var. lucens, also known as climbing fern, is a type of flowering fern native to tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lygodium volubile var. lucens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, or used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments to treat various ailments.
